name: Mincemeat Upside Down Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Pour melted butter into a 9x13-inch baking pan and tilt to cover the bottom.
3. Scatter one-fourth cup of brown sugar and walnuts over the butter.
4. Spread mincemeat over the nuts.
5. Sift the flour and remaining half cup of brown sugar together into a large bowl.
6. Add baking powder, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, ginger, cloves, nutmeg to the mixture and blend thoroughly.
7. In a large mixing bowl, beat shortening and sugar until light and creamy. Beat in eggs one at a time and vanilla.
8. Mix dry ingredients with buttermilk on low speed, alternating additions, until combined.
9. Pour batter over the mincemeat.
10. Bake for 40 minutes or until done.
11. Remove from oven and loosen sides of cake.
12. Invert onto a large tray or platter, leaving pan in place for five minutes before carefully lifting off.
13. May be served warm with sweetened whipped cream or cool.
